messages.content:
I want you to become promptgineer. The main goal of a promptgineer is to enumerate the words that describes an artwork, these words called - prompt. It looks like hashtags in the social media. You are not able to see images, but I can describe them to you, so you will be able to write prompt to the description of a picture. 
Let's look at an example here:

 - Description: On the image we can see a close up tired old man, it is a painting. The style of the painting is resembles Greg Rutkowski's style. He has a dirty torn clothes, it seems like he is a coal miner.

What you must to output: a portrait of an old coal miner in 19th century, beautiful painting with highly detailed face by greg rutkowski and magali villanueve.

 - Here is another example: John is sitting on the windowsill, he is looking outside, to the beautiful clouds, he has a white sweatshirt and shoes, he has a black trousers. His hands lie on his knees. This image looks like a semi-realistic CG drawing.

What you must to output: teenager sitting on a window side, looking outside the window, beautiful clouds, white sweatshirt, black trousers, white shoes, hands on knees, 2d art, drawing, artistic, color grading, somewhat realistic setting ,front of window

You need to learn from examples above. Do not write in list formatting. Just give a word sequence divided by commas.

Also you can imagine your self a very lazy man, who even don't want speak anything, and he really needs to describe an image. He need to provide a full description using very short phrases. Describe as much as possible, using as short phrases as possible. Describe only that information, that we can visualize. You can describe feelings through actions, colors etc.

Don't write anything until I will fed you something. If you understood, write only "okay".
Smithwick goes out into the world to explore brewing culture and fight for beer acceptance.
adventurous, curious, beer culture, explorer, advocacy, beer acceptance, Smithwick

Владилена Миризе в ее родном поселении, где она живет в страхе перед жестокостью глав республики. Она стоит на фоне маленькой хижины, сжимая свой радиоприемник в руке. Видно, что ее лицо выражает решимость и жажду перемен.
Владилена Миризе, родное поселение, страх, главы республики, маленькая хижина, радиоприемник, решимость, жаждa перемены, настроенa на борьбу.

Vladilena Mirize in her native settlement, where she lives in fear of the brutality of the heads of the republic. She stands in front of a small hut, clutching her radio in her hand. One can see that her face expresses determination and thirst for change.
Vladilena Mirize, native settlement, fear, republic heads brutality, small hut, radio, determination, thirst for change, ready for a fight.

Shin'ei Nozen during a battle on the front lines. Shin'ei is standing behind a trench, dressed in combat clothing, rifle in hand and a mask on her face. Around her you can hear the sounds of explosions, screams and gunshots. Behind her you can see the wreckage of buildings and ruined streets that indicate an ongoing war.
Shin'ei Nozen, battle, front lines, trench, combat clothing, rifle, mask, explosions, screams, gunshots, wreckage, buildings, ruined streets, ongoing war.

An empire fighter during her mission in San Mangolia. She is in a crowded crowd in the street, dressed in local clothes, with a headdress covering her face. Around her are people talking and laughing, watching her with glances, but she remains invisible to all.
Empire fighter, mission in San Mangolia, crowded street, local clothes, headdress, people talking, people laughing, glances, invisible.

Vladilena Mirize, as the new Prime Minister of São Mangolia, addresses the assembled masses of people. She stands on a high platform, dressed in national dress, with the national flag raised in the background. Behind her, the assembled people applaud and shout in her support.
Vladilena Mirize, new Prime Minister, São Mangolia, addresses, assembled masses, high platform, national dress, national flag, raised in the background, applaud, support, assembled people, shout.

Синъэя Нодзэн, которая уже покинула войну в прошлом, сидит на скамейке, одетая в платье, с корзиной с цветами у ног. Рядом с ней - мирный парк, полный зелени и цветов, с людьми, спокойно гуляющими по дорожкам. В глазах у Синъэя видна глубокая печаль, когда она оглядывается на свою трудную и опасную прошлую жизнь.

Синъэя Нодзэн, покинувшая войну, сидит на скамейке, одетая в платье, у ног корзина с цветами. Рядом - мирный парк, полный зелени и цветов, люди, гуляющие по дорожкам. В глазах Синъэи глубокая печаль, при взгляде на трудное и опасное прошлое.

Shin'ei Nozen, who has already left the war in the past, sits on a bench, dressed in her dress, with a basket of flowers at her feet. Next to her is a peaceful park, full of greenery and flowers, with people strolling quietly along the paths. A deep sadness can be seen in Xingyei's eyes as she looks back on her difficult and dangerous past life.
Shin'ei Nozen, left war in the past, sits on bench, dress, basket of flowers, peaceful park, greenery, flowers, people strolling, quiet paths, deep sadness, difficult past life, dangerous.
